hero.title: AI That Makes Your Products Sale-Ready
hero.description: MayaSolutions analyzes your photos and generates high-converting titles, descriptions, and keywords for Adobe Stock, Shutterstock, Etsy, Amazon, and e-commerce platforms in seconds.

mockup.dropzoneText: Drag your image here or browse files

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: The fastest and smartest way to get your visuals to marketplaces.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop your high-resolution stock photo or product image onto the platform.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our advanced image processing model detects colors, composition, objects, and potential SEO values.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Platform-specific metadata sets for e-commerce and stock sites are generated within seconds.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Complete your upload in seconds using exported CSV files or quick copy tools.

features.title: Professional Solutions
features.description: Advanced tools specifically designed for stock contributors and commercial brands.
features.f1Desc: Creates high-search-volume titles and marketplace-compatible descriptions tailored to each uploaded photo.
features.f2Desc: Generates pools of 25+ tags that best represent the image content and boost visibility in search algorithms.
features.f3Desc: Queue hundreds of photos at once and generate all metadata sets in the background in a single batch.
features.f4Desc: Get output in CSV formats specific to online sales channels like Adobe Stock, Shutterstock, Freepik, or Etsy.
features.f5Desc: Safely store all your previous analyses and generations, search and copy them anytime you need.
features.f6Desc: Create tags for both popular stock sites and online sales channels (Etsy, Trendyol, etc.) with a single click.

benefits.title:
Create More,
Sell Faster.
benefits.description: MayaSolutions fully automates the most tedious and time-consuming process in your creative workflow, so you can focus on what matters.
benefits.b1Desc: Stop entering keywords one by one for each image. Save up to 90% of your time.
benefits.b2Desc: Multiply your images' visibility on marketplaces with SEO-optimized algorithms.
benefits.b3Desc: Eliminate inaccurate and irrelevant tags. Deliver data that matches search results precisely.
benefits.b4Desc: List your new stock products for sale in hours instead of days with bulk export.

pricing.title: Flexible & Transparent Plans
pricing.description: Subscription packages suitable for every scale, from individual creators to large agencies.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Creators
testimonials.description: What creators managing world-class stock portfolios say about MayaSolutions.
testimonials.t1Quote: "Thanks to MayaSolutions, the tagging time for the 200+ stock photos I upload weekly dropped from 4 hours to 15 minutes. Plus, I've seen a noticeable increase in my sales."
testimonials.t2Quote: "We use MayaSolutions for tagging and SEO descriptions of our handmade wood products sold on Etsy and Amazon. The accuracy and quality of results in both Turkish and English is outstanding."
testimonials.t3Quote: "As a visual agency, we archive and catalog product images for hundreds of clients. MayaSolutions' CSV bulk export and history panel is exactly the professional solution we were looking for."

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Key topics and answers about MayaSolutions.
faq.q1: What is the accuracy of AI metadata generation?
faq.a1: MayaSolutions uses advanced computer vision and natural language processing algorithms. By analyzing objects, composition, and color tones in the image, it generates titles and tags compliant with stock site policies with over 95% accuracy.
faq.a2: We support all global stock photo platforms, primarily Adobe Stock, Shutterstock, Freepik, and Vecteezy. We also generate SEO-compatible titles and search tags for e-commerce platforms like Trendyol, Etsy, Amazon, and Shopify.
faq.q3: How is the privacy of my uploaded images protected?
faq.a3: Your privacy is very important to us. Uploaded images are only processed during the analysis and stored encrypted on our secure servers. None of your images are shared with third parties or used for general AI model training.
faq.q4: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a4: Yes, you can cancel your subscription or switch between plans anytime from the billing page in your dashboard, with no commitment. In case of cancellation, your access continues until the end of the current billing period.
